name: YouTube Authority System
description: Build a YouTube presence that drives subscribers, trust, and inbound leads for your business
outcome: 100+ subscribers and 3–5 inbound leads in 60 days

automation.action: Post community update + share to LinkedIn
automation.followUp: Reply to every comment within 24h to boost algorithm
Send email to list with video recap

assets.title: Channel Positioning Script
assets.content:
CHANNEL POSITIONING FRAMEWORK

Your channel in one sentence:
"I help [TARGET AUDIENCE] achieve [SPECIFIC OUTCOME] through [YOUR METHOD]."

Example: "I help freelance designers land premium clients through strategic personal branding."

---
YOUR NICHE STATEMENT
Fill in each blank:
- Who you serve: [e.g., solopreneurs, coaches, consultants]
- Their #1 frustration: [e.g., inconsistent income, no leads]
- Your unique angle: [e.g., systems-based, AI-powered, no-fluff]
- The result you deliver: [e.g., 3 high-ticket clients/month]

---
CHANNEL KEYWORDS (use in About section and video titles)
Primary keyword: [e.g., "solopreneur marketing"]
Secondary keywords: [3–5 related terms your audience searches]

---
ABOUT SECTION COPY
[Your niche statement]

On this channel, you'll find:
→ [Content pillar 1 — e.g., step-by-step systems]
→ [Content pillar 2 — e.g., real case studies]
→ [Content pillar 3 — e.g., tools and tech]

New videos every [day/week]. Subscribe so you don't miss the next one.

📩 Work with me: [your website or booking link]
📲 Follow on [platform]: [handle]

assets.title: Channel Trailer Script
assets.content:
CHANNEL TRAILER SCRIPT (60–90 seconds)

[0–5 sec — HOOK]
"If you're a [target audience] who wants [desired outcome] without [common pain], this channel is built for you."

[5–20 sec — WHO YOU ARE]
"I'm [Your Name]. I [what you do] — and I've spent [X years/time] figuring out what actually works when it comes to [your topic]."

[20–45 sec — WHAT THEY'LL GET]
"On this channel, every week I share:"
→ [Value 1 — e.g., real systems you can copy]
→ [Value 2 — e.g., honest breakdowns of what worked and what didn't]
→ [Value 3 — e.g., tools to save you hours]

[45–60 sec — PROOF]
"I've helped [X people / clients] go from [before state] to [after state]."
"Here's what [a subscriber / client] said: '[short testimonial].'"

[60–90 sec — CTA]
"If that sounds like what you need — hit Subscribe. I publish every [day/week] and I personally respond to comments."
"And if you're ready to [take next step], check the link in the description."

[End screen + subscribe button]

assets.title: 4-Week Content Calendar
assets.content:
4-WEEK YOUTUBE CONTENT CALENDAR

WEEK 1 — AUTHORITY (establish who you are)
Video: "[The #1 mistake [your audience] makes with [your topic]]"
Format: Talking head + screen share
CTA: Subscribe + comment your biggest challenge

Community Post: "Quick poll — what's your biggest struggle with [topic]?"
Options: A) [Pain 1]  B) [Pain 2]  C) [Pain 3]

WEEK 2 — EDUCATION (teach something valuable)
Video: "How to [achieve specific outcome] in [timeframe] — step by step"
Format: Tutorial / walkthrough
CTA: Download [free resource] in description

Community Post: Share a behind-the-scenes photo or screenshot of your process

WEEK 3 — STORY (build connection and trust)
Video: "[My honest story about [challenge you overcame]]"
Format: Talking head, personal + raw
CTA: Share this with someone who needs to hear it

Community Post: "What would you want me to cover next? Drop your question below."

WEEK 4 — CONVERSION (move viewers to action)
Video: "[The exact framework I use to help clients get [result]]"
Format: Breakdown of your signature system or offer
CTA: Book a call / DM me / link in description

Community Post: Share a client win or result (with permission)

assets.title: Video Description Template
assets.content:
VIDEO DESCRIPTION TEMPLATE
(Use for every video — customize sections in [ ])

---
In this video, I'm sharing [WHAT THE VIDEO COVERS] — specifically designed for [YOUR AUDIENCE].

You'll learn:
✅ [Key takeaway 1]
✅ [Key takeaway 2]
✅ [Key takeaway 3]

---
🔗 RESOURCES MENTIONED
• [Free resource / lead magnet]: [LINK]
• [Tool or book mentioned]: [LINK]
• [Related video]: [LINK]

---
📩 WORK WITH ME
[Your offer in 1–2 sentences]
→ Book a free call: [LINK]
→ Learn more: [LINK]

---
⏱ TIMESTAMPS
0:00 — Introduction
[X:XX] — [Chapter 1 title]
[X:XX] — [Chapter 2 title]
[X:XX] — [Chapter 3 title]
[X:XX] — Final thoughts + next steps

---
🔔 SUBSCRIBE for new videos every [frequency]

#[keyword1] #[keyword2] #[keyword3] #[keyword4] #[keyword5]

assets.title: Thumbnail Angle Guide
assets.content:
THUMBNAIL ANGLE GUIDE
(5 proven thumbnail formulas for solopreneurs)

FORMULA 1 — THE RESULT
Image: You holding/showing something (laptop, results, before/after)
Text overlay: "[Specific result] in [timeframe]"
Example: "$5K Client in 14 Days"

FORMULA 2 — THE MISTAKE
Image: Surprised/concerned face expression
Text overlay: "Stop doing this" or "[X] Mistakes to Avoid"
Arrow pointing to something on screen

FORMULA 3 — THE NUMBER
Image: Clean background, confident expression
Text overlay: "[X] Ways to [Achieve Outcome]"
Bold number in contrasting color

FORMULA 4 — THE QUESTION
Image: Thoughtful or curious expression
Text overlay: "Why [counterintuitive thing]?"
Creates curiosity gap that drives clicks

FORMULA 5 — THE COMPARISON
Image: Before vs. after or two options side by side
Text overlay: "[Option A] vs [Option B]"
X on the wrong option, checkmark on yours

---
DESIGN RULES:
• Use 3 colors max (brand color + white + one accent)
• Text should be readable at 100px wide (thumbnail size in search)
• Your face = higher CTR — use it whenever possible
• Consistent style across all thumbnails builds channel identity

Free tool: Canva (search "YouTube thumbnail" for templates)

assets.title: Email to List: New Video Announcement
assets.content:
Subject: New video — [Video Title]

Hey [First Name],

Just dropped a new video you're going to want to watch:

👉 [VIDEO TITLE]
[Link to video]

In it, I cover:
• [Key point 1]
• [Key point 2]
• [Key point 3]

This one's [X] minutes — you can watch it over coffee.

The [specific section/timestamp] is where most people find the biggest "aha" moment.

Hit reply and let me know what you think after you watch it.

[Your name]

P.S. If you know someone dealing with [problem the video solves], forward this to them. It might be exactly what they need.
